publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2023-08-05 00:05:27 UTC.
profiledesc.langusage: Description is written in: Undetermined, Code for undetermined script script.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Audio recordings of the radio shows featuring a wide range of folk performers. Reels include inserts with handwritten notes by Shapiro about the performances and a list of the songs played. The notes and lists may have spelling errors and song titles may have been generated from how the song sounded not the actual title. Some notes also include markings to indicate songs that were particularly notable.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp: //rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Bound for Glory is North America's longest running live folk concert radio broadcast. The show is broadcast live on WVBR 93.5 FM from Anabel Taylor Hall on the Cornell University campus Sunday nights. While the name of the room where the show is broadcast has changed over the years, the Commons Coffeehouse, Cul de Snack, the Cafe at Anabel Taylor, Alternatives Library, the space itself in Anabel Taylor has remained constant. Phil Shapiro made his first Ithaca broadcast of the show in September 1967 on the WVBR radio station. Bound for Glory presents folk music of all types and has run for over 1,500 concerts.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: This collection contains audio recordings documenting the history of the Bound for Glory folk music show. Audio recordings of the Bound for Glory radio shows featuring a wide range of folk performers. Reels include inserts with handwritten notes by Shapiro about the performances and a list of the songs played. The notes and lists may have spelling errors and song titles may have been generated from how the song sounded not the actual title. Some notes also include markings to indicate songs that were particularly notable.
Also included are digital recordings created by Doug Steinfeld off tapes collected by himself, Sari Goldbaum, and Janet Elis. These items are identified as part of the Doug Steinfeld collection.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: The Bound for Glory Documentary is available online here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=iF3N2xA5RB8

custodhist.head: Custodial History
custodhist.p: A portion of these recordings come from the collection of Doug Steinfeld. These tapes were digitized by Steinfeld who remains in possession of the physical tapes. Some of these recordings have a break from the initial recording when the tape was flipped over during set two of the performance. The Steinfeld collection also contains a set of Encore tapes. These tapes contain encores for shows that were not necessarily included on the on air broadcast or on the show tape.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Due to the fragility and potential degradation of moving image and sound recordings, viewing and listening is limited to items that have been digitized. If an item is in another media format, you may request to have the item digitized for access. Information on ordering access copies may be found on the Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections webpage.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Audio reels TR-15957-TR-15976, TR-17143, and TR-17144 have been digitized as well as the track listing inserts in each of these reel cases.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Bound for Glory records, #35-9-4277. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Shows were recorded on open reel audio, pre-1998, digital audio tape, apx. 1998-06-08 - 2006-12-03 and CDs post 2007.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Track list: Arrival; I Don't Amount to Much Without You; Mary, Martha and John; August Circumstances; Empty Space; While the Getting is Good; Volcanos; Twelve Turns to Midnight; Black; Here I Am Again; Peggy [unreadable]; Halfway Up the Stairs

custodhist.head: Custodial History
custodhist.p: These tapes were collected and digitized by Doug Steinfeld, but not all of them were necessarily recorded by him originally. Some of these recordings have a break from the initial recording when the tape was flipped over during set two of the performance.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: All tapes have been digitized and are available upon request.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: unknown On label: Queen

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: unknown Also labeled with date March 4, 2001 and performer Mark Rust

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: unknown On label: "None Such" and "Wizard of Oz, Billy Wizard, Blackbird Song Side A"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: unknown Also labeled with dates October 14, 1990 and September 15, 1991

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: unknown Date on label is August 14, 1993; label also lists "Country Sampler and Town"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: unknown Date on label is March 2, 1994

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 716 Date on label is September 8, 1990

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 716 Date on label is er 8, 1990

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 725 Also labeled with dates March 21, 1999, April 3, 1999, and October 24, 1999

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 753 Also labeled with dates May 22, 1999 and August 8, 1999

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 773 Date on label is April 25, 1992

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 773 Date on label is April 25, 1992

did.unittitle: Dan Berggren and the Newton Street Irregulars

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 818 Date on label is September 30, 1993

scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 881 Date on label is October 28, 1995

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 885 Date on label is December 2, 1995. Also listed on label: Country Sampler; E Town Judy Collins

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 928 Also labeled with date October 24, 1999

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 964 Also labeled with date October 28, 1990

did.unittitle: Mac Benford, Walt Koken, Bob Potts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 989 Also listed on label: 50s folk singer women

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Bound for Glory Show #: 1058 Also labeled with date April 24, 2000

dao.xlink:title: Bound for Glory North America's longest-running live folk concert [Delivery]

daodesc.p: Bound for Glory North America's longest-running live folk concert [Delivery]

did.unittitle: Bound for Glory The Documentary by Brad Kolodner (digital)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Short documentary by Brad Kolodner and Aya Hoffman when they were Ithaca College seniors. "This is a story about the passion and love one man has for folk music and the sacrifices he's made to keep this folk treasure alive."

did.unittitle: Bound for Glory 1500th Show Phil Shapiro Tribute Book (digital)

dao.xlink:title: Bound for Glory 1500th Show Phil Shapiro Tribute Book [Preservation]

daodesc.p: Bound for Glory 1500th Show Phil Shapiro Tribute Book [Preservation]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: CD-2668 a digital copy of the book.
